description_long: This shotgun features a long, matte-black barrel with a vented handguard extending nearly the full length, providing a modern tactical appearance. The receiver and magazine well are robust, with a detachable box magazine inserted below, suggesting rapid reload capability. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for secure handling, and the stock is a solid, full-length design integrated into the rear of the receiver. The trigger guard is squared and substantial, offering protection and space for gloved fingers. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a durable and utilitarian look. Minimal decorative elements are present, emphasizing function over form.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a long vented barrel, box magazine, and ergonomic pistol grip, finished in matte black. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a squared trigger guard and full stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the long vented barrel, box magazine, pistol grip, and full stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the handguard and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine, and the overall symmetry of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the pistol grip and trigger guard visible below.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated, robust with ample space for gloved fingers
